prestazioni: Replace the factory 400ci (6.6L) Rocket V8 (engine code: L78) with a forged internals build featuring a Scat Enterprises 4340 forged crankshaft (4.250" stroke), Eagle Specialty Products H-beam connecting rods (6.800" length), and JE Pistons forged aluminum slugs (4.155" bore, 10.5:1 compression). Pair with a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft (242°/248° duration @ 0.050", 0.585"/0.598" lift) and Harland Sharp 1.6:1 roller rockers for aggressive valvetrain performance.

Install a Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle-body injection system (900 CFM) with a FAST XFI Sportsman ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping, eliminating the stock Rochester 4GC carburetor. Integrate a TSP (Trick Flow Specialties) Track Heat intake manifold (dual-plane, high-rise) and a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system with Hooker Super Competition headers (1.75" primary tubes, 3.5" collectors) and Flowmaster 44 Series mufflers (deep tone, 3" in/out).

Upgrade the factory TH400 3-speed automatic transmission with a Hughes Performance Stage 3 street/strip torque converter (3,500 RPM stall) and a B&M Supercooler transmission cooler (11" x 11" x 1.5"). Pair with a Gear Vendors Overdrive unit (0.78:1 ratio) for highway cruising efficiency, and reinforce the drivetrain with a Mark Williams Enterprises aluminum driveshaft and a Strange Engineering S60 rear end (3.73:1 gear ratio, 35-spline axles, posi-traction).
estetica: Replace the stock body panels with a Restomod Air vintage-inspired widebody kit (fiberglass, 3" flares front/rear) to accommodate 17x9.5" and 17x11" Billet Specialties Vintec wheels (ET25/ET45 offsets) wrapped in Mickey Thompson ET Street R radial tires (275/40R17 front, 315/40R17 rear). Lower the stance with a Hotchkis Sport Suspension system (1.5" drop, adjustable front/rear sway bars) and Air Lift Performance 3P management for adjustable ride height.

Apply a custom 3-stage paint scheme by BASF Glasurit (base: PPG Deltron "Oldsmobile Flame Red" with gold metallic flakes, mid-coat: House of Kolor "Kandy Apple Red" for depth, clear: Spies Hecker Permacron 8080 for UV protection). Add retro-inspired graphics by Vinyl Images (black/white "442" stripe package with gold pinstriping) and replace the factory emblems with billet aluminum Oldsmobile script badges by Goodmark Industries.

Interior overhaul with a full TMI Products Pro-Series seat kit (black Nappa leather with red stitching, 4-way lumbar support) and a custom roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in design with harness bar). Install a RetroSound Bluetooth radio (AM/FM, USB, aux-in) with Focal Utopia Be tweeters and Kicker CompRT subwoofers (10", sealed enclosure) for modern audio. Replace the stock steering wheel with a Nardi Classic 380mm wood-rim wheel (black leather wrap) and add a Lokar shifter (T-handle, polished aluminum) for the TH400 transmission.
